Clojure + Go Kafka broker seam: Clojure produces enriched domain events to a Kafka topic; Go consumes them with a consumer group and manual offset commit. Shows KRaft setup, topic naming, event schema, and docker-compose.
Clojure Kafka producer side: publishes enriched domain events to the broker seam.
Go Kafka consumer side: receives enriched domain events as a worker pool from the broker seam.
Clojure + Go Kafka broker seam: producer-consumer pattern, KRaft schema, and health contract.

Elixir + Clojure RabbitMQ broker seam: Clojure (Langohr) produces enriched domain task events to a RabbitMQ topic exchange; Elixir (Broadway + broadway_rabbitmq) consumes them as a work queue. Shows exchange/queue/binding setup, DLX pattern, prefetch configuration, and docker-compose.
Clojure RabbitMQ producer side: publishes enriched domain task events to the topic exchange.
Elixir Broadway RabbitMQ consumer side: work-queue handler for domain task events.
Elixir + Clojure RabbitMQ broker seam: work queue pattern with Broadway consumer and topic exchange.

Elixir + Rust NIF/Port seam: Rust (Rustler) compiles into the Elixir BEAM VM as a native implemented function. Shows compute_hash and normalize_vector NIFs, the {:ok, result} Erlang term return convention, the Rustler init! macro, and when to use Port instead of NIF for unsafe operations. No docker-compose — this is an in-process seam.
Elixir NIF host module using Rustler to call the Rust compute kernel in-process.
Rust NIF implementation called from Elixir via Rustler with dirty-NIF annotation for CPU work.
Elixir + Rust NIF/Port in-process seam: Rustler NIF, dirty NIF, and Port vs NIF tradeoffs.
Go + Elixir broker seam: Go publishes NATS JetStream events, Elixir subscribes with a durable consumer. Shows stream setup, event schema, health probe, and docker-compose.
Elixir NATS JetStream durable consumer receiving domain events from the Go publisher.
Go NATS JetStream publisher side sending domain events to the Elixir subscriber.
Go + Elixir NATS JetStream broker seam: Go publishes, Elixir subscribes with a durable consumer.
Go + Python REST seam: Go gateway calls Python scoring service synchronously. Shows downstream health probe pattern, JSON schema, and docker-compose.
Go gateway side calling the Python scoring service over REST with downstream health probe.
Python scoring service side called by the Go gateway over REST.
Go + Python REST seam: Go gateway calls Python scoring service synchronously with downstream health probe.
Kotlin + Rust gRPC seam: Kotlin calls Rust compute server via typed RPC. Shows .proto contract, stub generation, health probe, and docker-compose.
Kotlin gRPC caller side invoking the Rust compute server with generated stubs.
Rust tonic gRPC server side called by Kotlin with server-side duration in the response.
Kotlin + Rust gRPC seam: typed RPC with .proto as source of truth, Kotlin calls Rust compute synchronously.
gRPC service proto definition shared between Kotlin caller and Rust server.

Node + Elixir NATS broker seam (bidirectional): Node (TypeScript/Hono) publishes client actions to NATS; Elixir (Gnat/GenServer) processes them and publishes state updates back through NATS to Node. Shows the collaborative app pattern: client connection layer (Node) + distributed state (Elixir).
Elixir NATS consumer side processing client actions and publishing distributed state updates.
Node/TypeScript NATS client side publishing client actions and subscribing to state updates.
Node + Elixir NATS bidirectional seam: Node publishes client actions, Elixir processes and publishes state updates back.

Node + Go REST seam: Node (Apollo Server / GraphQL BFF) resolves queries by calling a Go domain service (Echo) over HTTP/REST. Shows GraphQL resolver-to-REST pattern, downstream health probe, and docker-compose.
Go domain service side exposing a REST API consumed by the Node GraphQL BFF.
Node Apollo GraphQL BFF side resolving queries by calling Go's domain REST API.
Node + Go REST seam with GraphQL BFF: Node Apollo resolves GraphQL queries by calling Go's domain REST API.

Rust + Python gRPC seam: Rust (tonic) serves as the hot-path ML inference engine; Python (grpcio) calls it as an orchestrator. Shows proto contract, tonic server, Python gRPC client, downstream health probe, and docker-compose with Rust build time considerations.
Python gRPC orchestrator side calling the Rust inference server via generated stubs.
Rust tonic gRPC inference server: hot-path ML serving called by the Python orchestrator.
Rust + Python gRPC seam: Rust inference server, Python orchestrator; canonical AI platform hot-path pattern.
gRPC service proto definition shared between Rust inference server and Python caller.

Scala + Rust gRPC seam: Scala Akka Streams pipeline delegates per-element hot-path compute to a Rust tonic gRPC server using mapAsync. Shows KernelService proto contract (kernel.v1), Akka Streams gRPC integration via sbt-akka-grpc, and docker-compose with JVM + Rust build considerations.
Rust tonic gRPC compute kernel called by the Scala Akka Streams pipeline per element.
Scala Akka Streams pipeline side calling the Rust gRPC compute kernel per element via mapAsync.
Scala + Rust gRPC seam: Akka Streams pipeline delegates per-element compute to Rust via mapAsync.
gRPC service proto definition shared between Scala Akka Streams pipeline and Rust compute kernel.

Elixir + Go + Rust trio seam: Elixir (Gnat/GenServer) coordinates work by publishing to NATS JetStream; Go workers subscribe and call Rust (tonic/gRPC KernelService.Transform) for compute; Go publishes completion back to Elixir. Shows the inverted coordination topology (Elixir as orchestrator), NATS JetStream + gRPC dual seams, closed-loop coordination, and the kernel.v1 proto shared with scala-rust-grpc.
Elixir coordinator side for the Go+Rust trio: dispatches work via NATS and supervises workers.
Go workers side for the Elixir+Rust trio: consumes NATS tasks and calls Rust compute via gRPC.
Rust compute kernel side for the Elixir+Go trio: exposes a tonic gRPC service called by Go workers.
Elixir + Go + Rust NATS JetStream + gRPC trio seam: Elixir coordinator, Go workers, Rust compute kernel.
gRPC proto definition for the Go-to-Rust seam within the Elixir+Go+Rust trio.
Go + Elixir + Python trio: Go publishes jobs via NATS, Elixir coordinates and calls Python for scoring, Elixir fans out results. Shows both broker and REST seams with cascading healthchecks.
Elixir coordinator side for the Go+Python trio: supervises sources and coordinates via broker.
Go gateway side for the Elixir+Python trio: routes requests and calls Python inference via REST.
Python ML inference side for the Go+Elixir trio: exposes scoring via REST endpoint.
Go + Elixir + Python broker+REST trio seam: Go gateway, Elixir coordinator, Python ML inference.

Go + Rust + Python trio: Go orchestrates gRPC call to Rust for preprocessing, then REST call to Python for ML scoring. Shows proto contract (processing.v1), pipeline topology, and dual downstream health probe.
Go gateway side for the Rust+Python trio: orchestrates calls to Rust compute and Python ML.
Python ML preprocessing side for the Go+Rust trio: called by Go gateway over REST.
Rust tonic gRPC compute kernel side for the Go+Python trio.
Go + Rust + Python gRPC+REST trio seam: Go gateway, Rust compute, Python ML preprocessing.
gRPC proto definition for the Go-to-Rust seam within the Go+Rust+Python trio.

Node + Go + Python trio seam: Node (Apollo Server GraphQL BFF) calls Go (Echo domain service) over REST; Go calls Python (FastAPI ML) over REST for recommendation scoring. Shows the consumer product stack with cascading REST seams, Go as internal orchestrator, downstream health probes, and the Node→Go→Python vs Node→Go+Python topology trade-off.
Go domain service side for the Node+Python trio: exposes REST API consumed by Node BFF.
Node GraphQL BFF side for the Go+Python trio: resolves queries via Go REST and Python scoring.
Python ML scoring side for the Node+Go trio: exposes scoring endpoint called by Node BFF.
Node + Go + Python REST+REST trio seam: Node GraphQL BFF, Go domain service, Python ML scoring.

Structure-verified. The canonical reference for local Parquet write + SQL query without object storage.

Runnable PyArrow + boto3 example: write a partitioned Parquet dataset to MinIO using the staging-prefix pattern, then read back with DuckDB.
